zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Agnes Grant於大約1322年出生在蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾時，她的父親John Grant 4th of Stratherrick28歲，母親Mary le Leche29歲。她於1343年與Richard de Comyn Knight在蘇格蘭艾爾金爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。她去世於大約1375年在蘇格蘭享年55歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Agnes Grant于大约1322年出生在苏格兰阿爾迪史爾时，她的父亲John Grant 4th of Stratherrick28岁，母亲Mary le Leche29岁。她于1343年与Richard de Comyn Knight在苏格兰艾爾金爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。她去世于大约1375年在苏格兰享年55岁。

nameMeanings.name: Grant
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish, English, and especially Scottish (of Norman origin): nickname from Anglo-Norman French graund, graunt ‘tall, large’ (Old French grand, grant, from Latin grandis), given either to a person of remarkable size, or else in a relative way to distinguish two bearers of the same personal name, often representatives of different generations within the same family.
English: from the rare Middle English (and Old English) personal name Grante or Grente.
Irish: in Ireland this is usually the Norman Scottish name (see 1 above), but it was also adopted for Irish Mag Raighne, see Graney .

variants.name: Graney
meanings: Irish (Galway, Cork, and Kerry): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Mag Raighne ‘son of Raighne’, a pet form of Raghnall. It has sometimes been changed to Grant . See also Rainey .
Possibly an altered form of Swiss German Gräni, unexplained.

variants.name: Grand
meanings: French: nickname from Old French grand, grant ‘tall, large’, from Latin grandis. See also Grant 1 and 4, compare Degrand and Legrand .
German: topographic name for someone who lived in a gravelly area, from Middle Low German grand ‘coarse gravel’.
German: nickname from a southern word of uncertain origin meaning ‘frustration, anger, ire’.

variants.name: Grande
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Salvatore, Rocco, Domenic, Mario, Antonio, Santo, Orlando, Americo, Carmine, Gennaro, Luigi, Pasquale, Saverio, Alberico.  Spanish Jose, Carlos, Alicia, Ricardo, Jorge, Juan, Raul, Angel, Atilio.
Italian, Spanish, and Portuguese: nickname for someone of large stature, in either a literal or figurative sense, from grande ‘tall, large’.
German: habitational name from Grande in Holstein or Grand in Bavaria.

variants.name: General
meanings: African American: from the English vocabulary word general, possibly adopted as a surname in honor of a certain general of the US army, most probably Ulysses S. Grant (see Grant , compare President ). Compare also 3 below.
German: nickname for a mercenary (employed in royal services).
Hispanic (mainly Philippines): nickname from Spanish general ‘general’ (military officer).

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Agnes Grant was born about 1322, in Aberdeenshire, Scotland, her father, John Grant 4th of Stratherrick, was 28 and her mother, Mary le Leche, was 29. She married Richard de Comyn Knight in 1343, in Elginshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. She died about 1375, in Scotland, at the age of 55.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Agnes Grant est née environ 1322, à Aberdeenshire, Écosse, son père, John Grant 4th of Stratherrick, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Mary le Leche, avait 29 ans. Elle a épousé Richard de Comyn Knight en 1343, à Elginshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Elle est décédée environ 1375, à Écosse, à l’âge de 55 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Agnes Grant um 1322 in Aberdeenshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Grant 4th of Stratherrick 28 und ihre Mutter Mary le Leche 29. Sie hat 1343 in Elginshire, Scotland Richard de Comyn Knight geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Sie starb um 1375 im Alter von 55 Jahren in Scotland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Agnes Grant è nata il circa 1322 nel Aberdeenshire, Scotland, sua padre, John Grant 4th of Stratherrick, aveva 28 anni e sua madre, Mary le Leche, aveva 29 anni. Lei sposato Richard de Comyn Knight nel 1343, nel Elginshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì circa 1375, nel Scotland, all'età di 55 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Agnes Grantが約1322年にスコットランドアバーディーンシュアイアで生まれた時，父John Grant 4th of Stratherrickは28歳，母Mary le Lecheは29歳であった。1343年にスコットランドエルジンシュアイアでRichard de Comyn Knightと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼女は約1375年にスコットランドで55歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Agnes Grant(이)가 대략 1322년 스컷랜드 압르디실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Grant 4th of Stratherrick(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mary le Leche(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 1343년 스컷랜드 엘긴실르에서 Richard de Comyn Knight(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1375년 스컷랜드에서 55세의 나이로 사망했다.

mg.about 1322–about 1375: tany ho any amin'ny 1322–tany ho any amin'ny 1375

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Agnes Grant nasceu aproximadamente 1322, em Aberdeenshire, Scotland, seu pai, John Grant 4th of Stratherrick, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Mary le Leche, tinha 29 anos. Ela casou-se com Richard de Comyn Knight em 1343, em Elginshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1375, em Scotland, com 55 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Agnes Grant родилась около 1322 г. в местности абирдиншир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени John Grant 4th of Stratherrick было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary le Leche, 29. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard de Comyn Knight в 1343 г. в местности элгиншир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Она умерла около 1375 г. в местности Шотландия в возрасте 55 лет.

sm.about 1322–about 1375: e tusa o le 1322–e tusa o le 1375

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Agnes Grant nació aproximadamente 1322, en Aberdeenshire, Scotland, su papá, John Grant 4th of Stratherrick, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Mary le Leche, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Richard de Comyn Knight en 1343, en Elginshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió aproximadamente 1375, en Scotland, a la edad de 55 años.
